## 🔄 Type of Change

- [ ] ✨ New feature

---

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] Code follows the project's design system (Soft Organic Palette)
- [ ] All new colors reference approved design tokens only
- [ ] UI changes were designed/verified in Stitch MCP
- [ ] RLS policies are respected (no service role key in client code)
- [ ] Both `ar.json` and `en.json` are updated (if translation keys added)
- [ ] `flutter analyze` passes with no errors
- [ ] Tested on Chrome (`flutter run -d chrome`) or Android emulator
- [ ] `PROJECT_CONTEXT.md` updated if architecture decisions were made
